LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT TENDERLOIN HOUSING CLINIC, INC.'S MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT: DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO STRIKE THE APRIL 16, 2021 FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS ORDERED OFF CALENDAR FOR FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH CCP 435.5. THAT LAW REQUIRES A "MEET AND CONFER IN PERSON OR BY TELEPHONE" BEFORE A MOTION TO STRIKE IS FILED, AND THAT "[I]F AN AMENDED PLEADING IS FILED, THE RESPONDING PARTY SHALL MEET AND CONFER AGAIN." THE PARTIES ARE ORDERED TO MEET AND CONFER AND DEFENDANT'S RESPONSE TO THE AMENDED COMPLAINT IS NOW DUE BY JUNE 30, 2021. JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER, CLERK: W. TRUPEK, COURT REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO CSR# 8600, EMAIL: MARIA.TORREANO@GMAIL.COM, REPORTED. (302/RBU)

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT TENDERLOIN HOUSING CLINIC, INC.'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT: DEFENDANT'S DEMURRER TO THE APRIL 16, 2021 FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS ORDERED OFF CALENDAR FOR FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH CCP 430.41. THAT LAW REQUIRES A "MEET AND CONFER IN PERSON OR BY TELEPHONE" BEFORE A DEMURRER IS FILED, AND "[I]F AN AMENDED COMPLAINT IS FILED, THE RESPONDING PARTY SHALL MEET AND CONFER AGAIN." THE PARTIES ARE ORDERED TO MEET AND CONFER AND DEFENDANT'S RESPONSE TO THE AMENDED COMPLAINT IS NOW DUE BY JUNE 30, 2021.JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER, CLERK: W. DEMURRER to Amended COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jun-04-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT TENDERLOIN HOUSING CLINIC, INC.'s DEMURRER to 1ST Amended COMPLAINT:

Defendant's demurrer to the April 16, 2021 first amended complaint is ordered off calendar for failure to comply with CCP 430.41. That law requires a "meet and confer in person or by telephone" before a demurrer is filed, and "[i]f an amended complaint is filed, the responding party shall meet and confer again." The parties are ordered to meet and confer and defendant's response to the amended complaint is now due by June 30, 2021. =(302/RBU)

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Clerk: W. Trupek, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano CSR# 8600, email: maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. (302/RBU)

MOTION TO STRIKE Amended COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jun-04-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT TENDERLOIN HOUSING CLINIC, INC.'s MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST Amended COMPLAINT:

Defendant's motion to strike the April 16, 2021 first amended complaint is ordered off calendar for failure to comply with CCP 435.5. That law requires a "meet and confer in person or by telephone" before a motion to strike is filed, and that "[i]f an amended pleading is filed, the responding party shall meet and confer again." The parties are ordered to meet and confer and defendant's response to the amended complaint is now due by June 30, 2021.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Clerk: W. Trupek, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano CSR# 8600, email: maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. (302/RBU)
